title: X.Org Server CheckKeyTypes Buffer Overflow Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows local attackers to escalate privileges on affected installations of X.Org Server. An attacker must first obtain the ability to execute low-privileged code on the target system in order to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the handling of key types. The issue results from the lack of proper validation of the length of user-supplied data prior to copying it to a buffer. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to escalate privileges and execute arbitrary code in the context of root.
addtionnal_details: X.Org has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/xorg/xserver/-/commit/b85b00dd
timeline:
2026-02-19 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-06-09 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-06-09 - Advisory Updated
